analysis.consistency: Consistent with established Warlock Pact features. The mechanics clearly define creation, utility (magical damage), limitations (range/time), and the optional ritual for binding a specific magic weapon.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is comprehensive, covering the core function (creating a weapon), immediate benefits (proficiency, magical damage), limitations (disappearance conditions), and advanced functionality (binding a specific magic weapon via ritual).

benefits: Create a melee weapon in an empty hand.
Counts as magical for overcoming resistance/immunity.
limitations: Disappears if feature is used again, dismissed (no action), or character dies.

advanced_mechanic.name: Weapon Binding Ritual
advanced_mechanic.duration: 1 hour (can be done during a short rest)
advanced_mechanic.effect: Transforms a magic weapon into the pact weapon (stored in extradimensional space).
